调查十几年前的凶案，与变态杀人狂斗智斗勇。
穿越无人敢进的原始丛林，在天坑之中寻找落难者的尸体。
进入10万大山之中的神秘村庄，寻找一位小女孩……
是什么让一位刚毕业的大学生踏上了这样的不归之路？
这一切还得从一间凶宅，一个女鬼钻被窝开始说起。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fd1177a683673f43142c0d9a98b2091d","author":"写的什么垃圾","author_id":"","book_id":"7427437091522350142","book_name":"凶手：你不要过来呀！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"16.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7427437250490663486","read_count":"166852","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1940734"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"931","tags":"悬疑灵异,推理,无女主,破案,搞笑轻松,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/21b3442e3e0a55db3176bbf804c2e731~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394356&x-signature=hloJn09ua%2FFYn57Erv0PuKrKQqQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1618954569394263","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"404"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230412366AA3074A05431A0C3758"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_c     这本书里帽子叔叔，就像黑暗中的一道光，没有什么外外道道，主角也不会因为凶手是一个小孩子而选择手下留情，每一个案件鬼魂都有属于自己的人物性格，其中一些就像天使宝宝那种，真的很好，为别人考虑着想那种，有时候也挺逗抽象的，完全放开自己那种，主角也是，哈哈。多更，完全看不够！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743778184,"group_id":"7427437091522350142","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"“书中自有黄金屋”","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8RQ+z+aJ3vhHOFOtBztQeY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"272310657100563","user_name":"风是甜的"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"272310657100563","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663845879,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7427437091522350142","book_info":{"abstract":"【搞笑+架空+微悬疑+冒险+都市+无女主】
